home.title: EU-DOC Public Product Documentation Platform
home.subtitle: Turn company-approved certificates, DoC declarations, and manuals into searchable, shareable product document pages
home.searchPlaceholder: Enter certificate number, company name, product model...

features.title: Why Choose EU-DOC?
features.feature2Desc: Status displayed in real-time, avoid expiration
features.feature3Desc: One-click link generation for easy customer access

search.title: Certificate Search
search.tryDifferent: Try different keywords or adjust filters
search.searchTipsContent: You can search: company name, product, model, cert number, standard

certificate.dataQualityNotice: If you find any incorrect, outdated, or duplicate certificate information, please help us improve data quality.
certificate.reportErrorDesc: Please select the type of issue you found, and we will verify and handle it as soon as possible:
certificate.reportNotice: After submitting the report, administrators will review and process it within 1-3 business days. Thank you for your feedback!
certificate.pdfDocument: PDF Document · Click to view or download
certificate.fileUnderReview: The PDF file is under review
certificate.title: Certificate Details
certificate.notFoundText: The certificate number does not exist or has been deleted.

company.searchPlaceholder: Search product name, cert number, model...
company.notFoundText: This company does not exist or has been deleted.

upload.dragOrClick: Drag file here, or click to select

uploadStatus.pendingMessage: Your certificate is waiting for administrator review. Please be patient.
uploadStatus.approvedMessage: Congratulations! Your certificate has been approved and published.
uploadStatus.rejectedMessage: Sorry, your certificate was not approved. Please check the notes and resubmit.

duplicate.title: Certificate Already Exists
duplicate.message: The system detected that this certificate number already exists. Please confirm if this is a duplicate upload.
duplicate.notice: If this is a duplicate upload of the same certificate, we recommend canceling the operation. If it's a different certificate with the same number, you can continue and explain in the remarks.

recentViews.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all viewing history?

auth.agreement: I have read and agree to the

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Manage your basic information and contact details
profile.name: Name
profile.emailNote: Primary email for notifications and password recovery
profile.phoneNote: Phone number for login and password recovery
profile.securityNote: To manage login email, phone number, or password, go to 'Account Security'.
profile.cancelNote: To restore, refresh the page to reload saved data
profile.basicInfoDesc: This information is used for backend collaboration, team member identification and personal display.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Brief description of your responsibilities for team identification.

security.title: Account Security
security.desc: Change password, bind phone number, enable two-factor authentication
security.securityNote: For account security, please enter your current password before setting a new one.
security.phoneDesc: After binding, you can use your phone number to login and recover your account.
security.passwordDesc: It is recommended to change your password regularly and avoid using the same password across multiple sites.
security.twoFactorDesc: When enabled, you will need additional verification when logging in for better security.
security.recentLoginsDesc: If you notice any suspicious login activity, please change your password immediately and logout from other devices.
security.emailChangeNote: Email change requires email verification service, marked as pending
security.phoneBindNote: Phone binding requires SMS verification service, marked as pending
security.twoFactorNote: Two-factor authentication requires verification code/authenticator process, marked as pending

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.desc: Quick access to your saved certificates, products and companies
favorites.name: Name
favorites.favoriteDesc: Click the 'Favorite' button (star icon) on product, company or file detail pages to add to favorites.

history.title: Browsing History
history.desc: View your recently accessed certificates, products and companies
history.name: Name

notifications.title: Notification Center
notifications.desc: Review company verification, document review, and system notifications
notifications.centerDesc: Important notifications are pinned. Email notifications can be added later.
notifications.empty: No notifications yet. Company verification and document review updates will appear here.
notifications.noFilteredResults: No notifications match the current filter.

companyVerificationApproved.title: Company Verification Approved
companyVerificationApproved.desc: Your company “{{companyName}}” has been verified. Its public product documentation can now appear on public pages.

companyVerificationRejected.title: Company Verification Needs More Information
companyVerificationRejected.desc: The verification application for “{{companyName}}” was not approved. Update the information according to the review feedback and submit it again. {{noteSuffix}}

documentReviewApproved.title: Document Review Approved
documentReviewApproved.desc: The document “{{documentTitle}}” from “{{companyName}}” passed platform review and is now public.

documentReviewRejected.title: Document Review Rejected
documentReviewRejected.desc: The document “{{documentTitle}}” from “{{companyName}}” did not pass platform review. Contact an administrator, update it according to the review feedback, and submit it again. {{noteSuffix}}

companyManagement.basicInfoDesc: This information will be displayed on the company profile page for users and certification bodies.
companyManagement.companyChineseNamePlaceholder: e.g., 广州某某安全用品有限公司
companyManagement.companyEnglishNamePlaceholder: e.g., Guangzhou Safety Equipment Co., Ltd.
companyManagement.urlSlugNote: Used to generate company page link (e.g., /company/guangzhou-safety-equipment). If not filled, company ID will be used.
companyManagement.companyIntroPlaceholder: Introduce your main business, qualifications, and service scope.
companyManagement.publicDisplayNote: When disabled, users cannot view the company page on the frontend.
companyManagement.notCertifiedNote: Before certification, the company page will not be publicly displayed or indexed by search engines.
companyManagement.claimNote: Claiming a company requires submitting verification materials. Certification process will be integrated later.
companyManagement.confirmDeleteDraft: Delete the company draft “{{name}}”? This will remove the company's draft data.
companyManagement.verifyBeforePublic: The company must be verified before its page can be public
companyManagement.cancelHint: Refresh the page to restore the last saved information

companyNextStep.descRejected: Update the company information according to the review feedback and submit it again. You can continue uploading and organizing product documentation.
companyNextStep.descReviewing: You can continue organizing product documentation during the review. Public product documentation will appear in search and public pages after the company is verified.
companyNextStep.descIncomplete: You can batch upload certificates, DoC declarations, manuals, and other product documentation before completing the company profile and submitting verification. Unverified companies can upload up to 20 files, with a 20 MB limit per file.

productManagement.searchPlaceholder: Search product name, model, certificate number
productManagement.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe product use, features, applicable standards, etc.
productManagement.workspaceSearchPlaceholder: Search product name, model, or document
productManagement.completeHint: Documentation is complete and ready for public display or QR code sharing.
productManagement.noDocumentUpload: No document yet. Click to upload
productManagement.deleteBlockedByDocuments: This product still has {{count}} documents. Delete or move them in Document Management first.
productManagement.confirmDelete: Delete “{{name}}”? The product will no longer appear on public pages.
productManagement.modalDesc: The product page should explain what the product is, which models it covers, and whether its documentation is complete.
productManagement.saveBeforeImage: Save the product before uploading an image
productManagement.classificationHelpText: Consumer categories help users browse by use case; review/compliance categories help organizations search by regulations and standards.
productManagement.noRecommendationDesc: Add a product name, model, description, or a certificate with a standard number and try again.

classificationReasons.equestrianHelmet: Matched equestrian helmet keywords or EN 1384 / VG1
classificationReasons.cyclingHelmet: Matched cycling helmet keywords or EN 1078
classificationReasons.charger: Matched charger/power keywords or common electrical standards
classificationReasons.audioVideo: Matched audio/video keywords or EN 62368 / EMC
classificationReasons.eyeProtection: Matched eye protection keywords or EN 166
classificationReasons.handFootProtection: Matched hand/foot protection keywords or EN 388 / EN ISO 20345
classificationReasons.medicalMask: Matched mask/medical keywords or EN 14683 / EN 149
classificationReasons.machinery: Matched machinery keywords or machinery safety standards

productManagement.modelsHint: A product series can cover multiple models. Keep each model separate so certificates and documents can be organized accurately.
productManagement.usageScenarioPlaceholder: e.g., equestrian training and riding protection
productManagement.publicDescriptionPlaceholder: A short user-facing introduction, use case, and precautions
productManagement.noRelatedDocuments: No documents are linked to this product. Use Add Document or Batch Import to add them.

fileManagement.searchPlaceholder: Search file name, product model, certificate number
fileManagement.pendingFilesDesc: Upload files to the staging area first, then organize them into products later.
fileManagement.clickToSelectFiles: Click here to select multiple files
fileManagement.filesOrganized: Files have been organized into product data

statuses.pendingContactAdmin: Pending platform review. Contact an administrator.

fileManagement.libraryDesc: Review document ownership, language, type, certificate details, replacements, and previews in the company document library.

overview.allDesc: All archived documents for the current company
overview.certificateDesc: Evidence of product testing and certification
overview.manualDesc: Instructions that help users understand the product
overview.unboundDesc: These documents may not appear on public product pages
overview.pendingDesc: Pending platform review. Contact an administrator.
overview.rejectedDesc: Update the document according to the review feedback and submit again

fileManagement.librarySearchPlaceholder: Search document, product, certificate number, or standard
fileManagement.noPreviewUrl: No preview URL is available for this document
fileManagement.noFilteredDocuments: No documents match the current filters.
fileManagement.noPreviewReplaceHint: No preview URL is available. Replace or upload the file to complete this document.
fileManagement.selectOrUploadFirst: Upload or select a document first
fileManagement.uploadMissingUrl: The document was submitted but no file URL was returned. Upload it again.
fileManagement.replaceMissingUrl: Replacement failed because no new file URL was returned
fileManagement.missingFileDesc: The corresponding file is missing. Upload or replace it.
fileManagement.uploadFormatHint: Supports PDF, PNG, JPG, WebP, and Word; maximum 20 MB per document
fileManagement.serverFileMissing: Document information exists, but the server has no linked file URL
fileManagement.autoFillHint: The title and language will be detected after upload and can still be edited
fileManagement.lockedEntryDesc: The product and document type are locked based on the selected entry. Upload or review the remaining information.
fileManagement.generalMaintainDesc: Certificates, DoC declarations, and manuals can all be maintained here.
fileManagement.publicOnlyWarning: Only maintain documents intended for public display. Do not upload commercially sensitive materials.
fileManagement.titleAutoFillPlaceholder: Filled automatically after file selection; editable
fileManagement.previewDesc: Use this preview to verify the document without changing it.

memberManagement.name: Name
memberManagement.memberDesc: View member identity, adjust roles or deactivate permissions.
memberManagement.roleNote: Different roles determine what members can do.
memberManagement.ownerNote: Company owner should be determined through company verification; administrators and employees should join by invitation. Platform only intervenes in special cases like disputes or account anomalies.
memberManagement.enterRegisteredEmail: Enter the email of a registered user
memberManagement.platformReadOnlyDesc: A platform administrator is viewing the company membership in read-only mode and will not become a company member.
memberManagement.memberSourceDesc: Members are loaded from the current company account relationships. The person must register with EU-DOC before being added.
memberManagement.platformInterventionDesc: The platform oversight view is read-only. Any intervention should follow a separate audited process with a recorded reason.
memberManagement.canChangeRolesDesc: You can change the roles of members who are not owners.
memberManagement.ownerOnlyDesc: Only the company owner can change member roles.
memberManagement.noFilteredMembers: No members match the current filters.
memberManagement.inviteDesc: Enter the email of a registered EU-DOC user. The account receives the selected permissions immediately after being added.

inviteRoles.admin: Company Admin - manage products, documents, and members
inviteRoles.uploader: Document Uploader - upload and manage documents
inviteRoles.viewer: View-only Member - view company information only

memberManagement.registeredOnlyNote: This version can only add registered accounts and does not send misleading invitation emails to unregistered addresses.

certificationManagement.certificationDesc: Company certification confirms your authority to manage this company. Once certified, you'll receive an official badge.

importWizard.title: Batch Import
importWizard.uploadHint: Support batch upload of PDF, images and other files
importWizard.highConfidenceDesc: Model, type and language are all clear
importWizard.mediumConfidenceDesc: Model and type are basically clear, language needs confirmation
importWizard.lowConfidenceDesc: Insufficient recognition information, careful review recommended
importWizard.recommendedProduct: System detected this file may belong to the product selected above. Recommend associating it to avoid duplicate creation.

platformManagement.desc: Platform admin functions. Real review, user, report and system settings data will be integrated later.
platformManagement.companyReviewDesc: Review company verification applications and company information.
platformManagement.userManagementDesc: Query and manage platform user accounts.
platformManagement.reportsDesc: Handle user reports about false information, copyright infringement and expired files.
platformManagement.categoryManagementDesc: Maintain product category system. Categories should be stored in database and can be expanded as business grows.
platformManagement.systemSettingsDesc: Admins only modify low-risk operational information; underlying rules are maintained by platform technical configuration.
platformManagement.maintenanceNotice: Displayed when website is under maintenance or some features are unavailable.

businessInquiry.title: Business Inquiry
businessInquiry.description: If you wish to upload your company's product compliance documentation to our platform, please contact us:
businessInquiry.response: We will respond to your inquiry within 1-2 business days.

technicalSupport.title: Technical Support
technicalSupport.description: If you encounter technical issues while using the platform, please contact our support team:

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: For business cooperation, media interviews, or other partnership opportunities, please contact:

reportError.title: Report Error
reportError.description: If you find errors or false information in product documentation on the platform, please use the feedback feature on the document detail page, or send an email to 327114305@qq.com.

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete?
messages.networkError: Network error. Please check if the backend service is running

share.note: Note: This link is for viewing public product documentation provided by the company.
share.qrDesc: Use it on products, packaging, manuals, or send it to customers, buyers, and reviewers.
share.copyDesc: The text includes key identity information and the access link, ready to send to customers, buyers, or reviewers.

authFlow.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

authFlow.termsRequired: Please read and agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
authFlow.agreePrefix: I have read and agree to the

authFlow.devResetHint: Open the link below to reset your password:
authFlow.networkError: Network error. Please try again later
authFlow.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been reset. Please sign in with the new password.
authFlow.redirectToLogin: This page will redirect to the login page in 3 seconds
authFlow.verifyFailedRetry: Verification failed. Please try again later.

personalLibrary.favoritesSubtitle: Save companies, products, and product data you care about for quick review and organization.
personalLibrary.historySubtitle: Review companies, products, and product data you have viewed recently.
personalLibrary.favoritesSearchPlaceholder: Search library: company, product, data, note
personalLibrary.emptyFavoritesDesc: Favorites from company, product, or data detail pages will appear here.
personalLibrary.emptyHistoryDesc: Viewed companies, products, and data will be recorded here automatically.
personalLibrary.organizeDesc: Choose a favorite group or create a new one. Notes help record purpose and follow-up use.
personalLibrary.newGroupPlaceholder: e.g. Client project / Tender data / To purchase
personalLibrary.notePlaceholder: e.g. Client will review next week; may be used for tender data.

companyVerification.title: Company verification
companyVerification.subtitle: Submit company verification data to receive a verified profile and expanded access.
companyVerification.visibilityHint: Before approval, company pages and product data will not be public automatically. Companies can manage visibility in the admin backend.
companyVerification.benefitQuota: More product and data upload quota
companyVerification.authorizationHint: Upload an authorization letter if the applicant is not the legal representative.
companyVerification.companyRequired: Please select a company to verify
companyVerification.submitSuccess: Verification application submitted. Waiting for admin review.
companyVerification.submitRetry: Submission failed. Please try again later.
